headline: Xavi Valero
body: Exclusive: Xavi Valero has stepped down as Liverpool's head of first-team goalkeeper coaching. Parting of the ways is amicable. LFC currently assessing options as they look to appoint his successor. Colin Stewart will fill the void on a temporary basis. nytimes.com/athletic/7425990… Link Liverpool head of goalkeeper coaching Xavi Valero steps down after only 12 months The Spaniard drawing to a close his second spell at the Merseyside club is amicable and unrelated to the departure of head coach Arne Slot. nytimes.com
raw_text:
Exclusive: Xavi Valero has stepped down as Liverpool's head of first-team goalkeeper coaching. Parting of the ways is amicable. #LFC currently assessing options as they look to appoint his successor. Colin Stewart will fill the void on a temporary basis.

nytimes.com/athletic/7425990…

Link



Liverpool head of goalkeeper coaching Xavi Valero steps down after only 12 months

The Spaniard drawing to a close his second spell at the Merseyside club is amicable and unrelated to the departure of head coach Arne Slot.
nytimes.com
